articles.title: Kubernetes teams trust automation to ship code but not to touch CPU, and AI is raising the stakes
articles.summary: Kubernetes teams automate deployments without thinking about it. CI/CD pipelines fire dozens of times a day, autoscaling adjusts replicas in the background, rollback is muscle memory. But there is one category of automation where that confidence vanishes: letting a system change CPU and memory requests on a running workload without a human reviewing it first.  And as AI inference lands on Kubernetes at scale, that hesitation is becoming hard to ignore, and increasingly expensive. Why teams trust automation for change but not for constraint We surveyed 321 Kubernetes practitioners at enterprise organizations earlier this year. articles.title: OpenClaw and Hermes agree on what an agent is. They disagree on what controls it.
articles.summary: At Microsoft’s Build keynote this month, CEO Satya Nadella described a platform shift away from operating systems and apps, and toward agentic AI that doesn’t wait to be opened by a user. Then he showed the layer that makes the shift possible: OpenClaw , an open-source harness and independent project released only months earlier, running natively on Windows inside Microsoft’s new execution containers. Built on top of it was Scout, Microsoft’s always-on enterprise agent . A harness barely a year old, onstage as governed infrastructure. Nvidia had made the case more bluntly at its GTC conference in March, where Jensen Huang called OpenClaw “the operating system for personal AI.” The analogy sticks: A harness does for a language model what an OS does for a processor. articles.title: Developers are now validating code they didn’t write — and may not understand
articles.summary: With an eye on the huge downstream pressure that AI code tools are putting on software engineering teams, GitLab released its AI Accountability Report on Tuesday to assess which direction the “industry conversation” is moving in.  The narrative now appears to have shifted from how quickly teams can generate code to whether they can actually control what they ship.  The Harris Poll for GitLab surveyed 1,528 developers and technology buyers across six countries. Some 91% of organizations have two or more AI coding tools in active use, and 78% report that developers are writing and committing code faster since adopting AI tools. In an interview with The New Stack , NX’s founders argue that while agents can do a lot within a single repository, they tend to stall when a change involves other repositories or depends on work someone else has already done. Polygraph, which combines multiple repos with context from agent traces, wants to change this. articles.summary: Algae blooms, peeling paint, and a host of fixes from hydrogen peroxide to nanobubblers have made it hard to diagnose what’s wrong with the Reflecting Pool—let alone how to clean up the mess.

articles.summary_zh: 從藻類繁殖、剝落油漆到各種從過氧化氫到奈米氣泡的修復方案，要診斷反思池的問題變得困難，更遑論如何清理了。

articles.title: The ‘Parasite of Parasites’ Has Been Discovered in the Tropical Forests of Borneo

articles.title_zh: 「寄生蟲的寄生蟲」在婆羅洲熱帶雨林被發現
articles.summary_zh: 一種新發現的真菌物種攻擊著控制螞蟻的著名「殭屍蘑菇」。

articles.summary_zh: Fellow Series 1 濃縮咖啡機首次促銷，力度很大。其他 Fellow 設備也享受 20% 優惠。

articles.title: Kioxia’s Executive Pay Jumps After AI Boosts Demand and Stock
articles.summary: Executive pay at Japanese flash memory maker Kioxia Holdings Corp. surged, a reflection of runaway global demand for AI-related chips.
articles.title_zh: Kioxia 高管薪酬在 AI 提振需求和股價後大幅上升
articles.summary_zh: 日本快閃記憶體製造商 Kioxia Holdings Corp. 的高管薪酬激增，反映了全球對 AI 相關芯片的爆發性需求。

articles.title: Tencent Tests DeepSeek-Powered AI Agent for WeChat Corporate App
articles.summary: Tencent Holdings Ltd. is preparing to launch an AI agent for its Slack-like enterprise communication app, intensifying a high-stakes battle among Chinese tech giants to lock users into their ecosystems in the post-ChatGPT era.
articles.title_zh: 騰訊測試 WeChat 企業應用的 DeepSeek 驅動 AI 代理
articles.summary_zh: 騰訊控股有限公司正在準備為其 Slack 式企業通訊應用推出 AI 代理，在 ChatGPT 後時代激烈競爭中加劇了中國科技巨頭鎖定用戶的戰鬥。

articles.title: ByteDance Seeks $20 Billion in Its Largest-Ever Offshore Loan
articles.summary: ByteDance Ltd., the developer of TikTok, is in preliminary talks with banks for a borrowing of about $20 billion, people familiar with the matter said, in what would be the firm’s largest offshore loan yet at a time when it’s boosting investments in artificial intelligence.
articles.title_zh: 字節跳動尋求 200 億美元最大海外貸款
articles.summary_zh: TikTok 開發商字節跳動有限公司正在與銀行進行初步談判，尋求約 200 億美元的借款，這將是該公司迄今最大的海外貸款，此時正值它加大對人工智慧的投資。

articles.title: BlackRock-Backed AIP, KKR Said to Court Stack Asia Data Centers
articles.summary: The Artificial Intelligence Infrastructure Partnership and Brookfield Asset Management Ltd. are among possible bidders for Stack Infrastructure Inc.’s data centers in the Asia-Pacific region, according to people familiar with the matter.
articles.title_zh: BlackRock 支持的 AIP、KKR 據稱追求 Stack Asia 數據中心
articles.summary_zh: 據了解相關情況的人士透露，人工智慧基礎設施合作夥伴和 Brookfield Asset Management Ltd. 是 Stack Infrastructure Inc. 亞太地區數據中心的可能競標者之一。

articles.title: Bain Capital's Zhu on Investing in China
articles.summary:
Jonathan Zhu, Greater China Chairman at Bain Capital, discusses his outlook and strategies for investing in the Chinese market.
He speaks with Stephen Engle on the sidelines of the World Economic Forum in Dalian on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade". (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 貝恩資本朱對投資中國的看法
articles.summary_zh: 貝恩資本大中華區主席朱討論了他對中國市場投資的展望和策略，在大連世界經濟論壇會場邊緣接受彭博電視採訪。

articles.title: Philippines Bans GoreBox After Three Killed in School Shooting
articles.summary: The Philippine cybercrime agency has temporarily banned online game GoreBox after initial police investigations showed that one of the two students allegedly involved in this week’s school shooting was an avid player.
articles.title_zh: 菲律賓在校園槍擊事件致三死後禁用 GoreBox
articles.summary_zh: 菲律賓網路犯罪機構在涉及本週校園槍擊事件的兩名學生之一被發現是該遊戲狂熱玩家後，臨時禁用在線遊戲 GoreBox。

articles.title: Indian Tech’s Nifty Share Shrinks to Record Low on AI Worries
articles.summary: India’s software exporters are steadily losing their sway on the country’s stock market as concerns over artificial intelligence-led disruption trigger a prolonged selloff in the sector.
articles.title_zh: 印度科技 Nifty 股份因 AI 擔憂跌至創紀錄低點
articles.summary_zh: 由於對人工智慧導致的破壞的擔憂引發持續拋售，印度軟體出口商在國家股市中的影響力穩步下降。

articles.title: Zhipu Said to Weigh Multibillion-Dollar Share Sale in Hong Kong After 2,000% Gain
articles.summary: Chinese artificial-intelligence model maker Zhipu is considering a share sale to raise several billion US dollars in Hong Kong, people familiar with the matter said, after soaring 2,000% since its listing in January.
articles.title_zh: 智譜據稱在上漲 2000% 後考慮在香港進行數十億美元融資
articles.summary_zh: 據了解情況的人士透露，中國人工智慧模型製造商智譜正在考慮在香港進行融資以籌集數十億美元，此前自今年 1 月上市以來股價已飆升 2000%。

articles.title: Philippine Tycoon Boosts PhilWeb Investment in Online Gaming Push
articles.summary: Philippine billionaire Lance Gokongwei is taking a 15% stake in online gaming technology firm PhilWeb Corp., boosting the company’s foray into artificial intelligence and the tycoon’s exposure to the gaming industry.
articles.title_zh: 菲律賓大亨加大 PhilWeb 投資以推進在線遊戲
articles.summary_zh: 菲律賓億萬富翁 Lance Gokongwei 在在線遊戲技術公司 PhilWeb Corp. 中買入 15% 股份，推進公司進入人工智慧領域，也增加了這位大亨在遊戲產業的敞口。

articles.title: SoftBank’s Masayoshi Son Scraps Plan to Retire in His Sixties
articles.summary: SoftBank Group Corp.’s Masayoshi Son said he plans to hold onto the top spot at the technology group he founded for another decade or more, shredding his long-held plan to hand over the reins in his sixties.
articles.title_zh: SoftBank 孫正義放棄六十多歲退休計劃
articles.summary_zh: SoftBank Group Corp. 的孫正義表示計劃在他創辦的科技集團掌舵再增加十年或更長時間，推翻了他長期以來在六十多歲時交出管理權的計劃。

articles.title: AirPods Maker Luxshare Gauges Interest for $3 Billion Hong Kong Listing
articles.summary: Electronics manufacturer Luxshare Precision Industry Co. has started gauging interest for a Hong Kong listing that may raise about $3 billion, according to people familiar with the matter who asked not to be identified to discuss a private matter, moving toward what could be one of the city’s biggest deals this year.
articles.title_zh: AirPods 製造商立訊精密衡量 30 億美元香港上市興趣
articles.summary_zh: 電子製造商立訊精密工業有限公司已開始衡量香港上市的興趣，可能籌集約 30 億美元，據了解相關情況但要求匿名的人士透露，此舉可能成為香港最大上市案之一。

articles.title: JD.com's Shen on China Economic outlook
articles.summary:
Shen Jianguang, VP and Chief Economist at JD.Com, shares his outlook on China’s economy as the nation accelerates into an AI‑driven era marked by surging demand.
He speaks with Bloomberg's Minmin Low on the sidelines of the World Economic Forum in Dalian, China on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade". (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 京東沈對中國經濟前景的看法
articles.summary_zh: 京東集團副總裁兼首席經濟學家沈建光分享了他對中國經濟的展望，因為該國正在加速進入由 AI 驅動的時代，帶來了飆升的需求，並在大連世界經濟論壇會場邊緣接受彭博電視採訪。

articles.title: WEF Co-chair on Global Economic Outlook
articles.summary:
André Hoffmann, Co-Chair of the World Economic Forum, discusses his outlook for global growth and China's economy amid ongoing conflict in the Middle East and market volatility.
He speaks with Bloomberg's Stephen Engle on the sidelines of the World Economic Forum in Dalian, China on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade". (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: WEF 聯席主席談全球經濟前景
articles.summary_zh: 世界經濟論壇聯席主席 André Hoffmann 討論了全球成長和中國經濟的展望，同時中東持續衝突和市場波動問題存在，並在大連世界經濟論壇會場邊緣接受彭博電視採訪。

articles.title: Musk’s SpaceX Adds Billions in Debt While Cutting Interest Costs
articles.summary: Elon Musk is no stranger to financial alchemy. His latest feat: adding billions of dollars of debt onto his cash-burning business empire while simultaneously cutting its annual interest burden.
articles.title_zh: 馬斯克的 SpaceX 增加數十億債務同時削減利息成本
articles.summary_zh: 埃隆·馬斯克不是金融煉金術的陌生人，他的最新壯舉：向他燒錢的商業帝國增加數十億美元債務，同時降低其年度利息負擔。

articles.summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are ProShares Head of Research & CIO, Active Investments Alessio de Longis, Citi Senior Equity Research Analyst Ariel Rosa, JP Morgan Asset Management Global Head of Real Estate Chad Tredway, Permanent Portfolio President & Portfolio Manager Michael Cuggino, Third Bridge Global Head of Sector Analysts Peter McNally, D.A. articles.title: Anthropic Customer Sues US Over Loss of Fable AI Access
articles.summary: An artificial intelligence startup that uses Anthropic PBC’s AI models sued the US over a government order that the maker of Claude and Mythos keep its most advanced technology out of the hands of foreign nationals.
articles.title_zh: Anthropic 客戶因失去 Fable AI 訪問權而起訴美國
articles.summary_zh: 一家使用 Anthropic PBC AI 模型的人工智慧新創公司起訴美國，抗議政府命令 Claude 和 Mythos 的製造商將其最先進技術放在外國國民手中。

articles.title: German Rail Halted Nationwide Services After Radio System Outage
articles.summary: Germany’s national rail operator temporarily halted services countrywide late on Tuesday after an outage of its communication system.
articles.title_zh: 德國鐵路在無線電系統中斷後暫停全國服務
articles.summary_zh: 德國國家鐵路運營商週二晚間在其通訊系統中斷後臨時暫停了全國服務。

articles.title: Cerebras Drops After 2026 Sales Outlook Disappoints Investors
articles.summary: Cerebras Systems Inc. shares fell about 10% in late trading after the newly public chipmaker gave an annual sales forecast that disappointed investors looking for the company to take a bigger slice of the AI data center market.
articles.title_zh: Cerebras 股價因 2026 年銷售前景不佳而下跌
articles.summary_zh: 芯片製造商 Cerebras Systems Inc. 股價在盤後交易中下跌約 10%，因其發布的年度銷售預測未能滿足投資者對公司在 AI 數據中心市場中獲得更大份額的期望。

articles.title: Digital Credit Could Be $3T Market: Cole
articles.summary: Matt Cole, CEO of Strive, joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 數位信貸市場可能達 3 兆美元：Cole
articles.summary_zh: Strive 執行長 Matt Cole 在 Bloomberg Crypto 節目中與 Scarlet Fu 和 Tim Stenovec 進行討論。

articles.title: China’s Instagram Gets Ready to Go Public
articles.summary: On today’s Big Take Asia podcast, we look at Xiaohongshu’s push to go public and what it reveals about confidence in China’s tech sector.
articles.title_zh: 中國的 Instagram 準備上市
articles.summary_zh: 在 Big Take Asia 播客中，我們探討小紅書推進上市的動向，以及這對中國科技產業信心的反映。

articles.title: Meta’s Cox Sought Shah’s WhatsApp Advice — Then Made Him Leader
articles.summary: Meta Platforms Inc.’s decision to hand leadership of WhatsApp to Kunal Shah, one of India’s most prominent angel investors and the founder of fintech startup Cred, started with a cold email.
articles.title_zh: Meta 的 Cox 尋求 Shah 對 WhatsApp 的建議，隨後提拔他為領導者
articles.summary_zh: Meta Platforms Inc. 決定將 WhatsApp 領導權交給印度著名天使投資人兼金融科技新創公司 Cred 創辦人 Kunal Shah，始於一封冷郵件。

articles.title: GameStop CEO Drops $35 Billion Pay Plan to Focus on eBay Bid
articles.summary: GameStop Corp. Chief Executive Officer Ryan Cohen withdrew a bonus plan that could have paid him as much as $35 billion so that his company can be “fully focused on GameStop’s operating performance and its proposed eBay acquisition.”
articles.title_zh: GameStop 執行長放棄 350 億美元薪酬計劃以專注 eBay 收購案
articles.summary_zh: GameStop Corp. 執行長 Ryan Cohen 撤銷了可能使他獲得高達 350 億美元獎金的計劃，以便公司能夠「全力專注於 GameStop 的營運績效和提議中的 eBay 收購案」。

articles.title: FDA Drops Complaint Against Whoop’s Blood Pressure Tracking Tool
articles.summary: The US Food and Drug Administration dropped its complaint against fitness tracker brand Whoop Inc. over its blood-pressure tracking tool, marking an about-face after the agency initially asked the company to disable it.
articles.title_zh: FDA 撤銷對 Whoop 血壓追蹤工具的投訴
articles.summary_zh: 美國食品和藥物管理局撤銷了對健身追蹤品牌 Whoop Inc. 其血壓追蹤工具的投訴，這標誌著該機構在初期要求公司停用該功能後的立場逆轉。

articles.title: BOE Sets $52.8B Stablecoin Cap and Drops Holding Limit
articles.summary: Bloomberg's Anna Irrera joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." The Bank of England has scrapped plans to limit how much firms and households can hold in UK stablecoins and instead introduced a temporary £40 billion ($52.8 billion) cap for the total issuance of each coin. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 英國央行設定 528 億美元穩定幣上限並放寬持有限制
articles.summary_zh: 英格蘭銀行取消了限制公司和家庭持有英國穩定幣額度的計劃，改而為每種幣的總發行量設定臨時 400 億英鎊（528 億美元）上限。

articles.title: AI Boom Sees Investors Shift From Japan’s Value to Growth Stocks
articles.summary: Japanese equities, long regarded by global investors as a value market, are beginning to attract growth funds, as AI-linked firms power to the top of market-cap rankings, beating out the manufacturers and telecoms giants that dominated for decades.
articles.title_zh: AI 熱潮促使投資者從日本價值股轉向成長股
articles.summary_zh: 長期被全球投資者視為價值市場的日本股票，正因 AI 相關企業衝上市值排行榜頂端而開始吸引成長型基金，超越數十年來主導市場的製造商和電信巨頭。

articles.title: Top Energy Fund Likes Japan Stocks That Power AI Efficiently
articles.summary: One of the world’s best-performing energy funds is doubling down on companies that help data centers consume power more efficiently, with Japanese stocks among its top investments.
articles.title_zh: 頂級能源基金看好日本股票中高效驅動 AI 的公司
articles.summary_zh: 全球表現最佳的能源基金之一正加倍投資於幫助數據中心提高電力使用效率的公司，日本股票成為其頂級投資之一。

articles.title: Cuomo to Lead Crypto Venture With New York Stock Exchange Owner
articles.summary: Bloobmerg's Katherine Doherty joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." Former New York Governor Andrew Cuomo is starting a second act: Helping cryptocurrency exchange operator OKX and the owner of the New York Stock Exchange build a new business that merges digital and traditional finance markets. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: Cuomo 領導與紐約證券交易所所有者的新密碼貨幣合資企業
articles.summary_zh: 前紐約州州長 Andrew Cuomo 正在開啟新事業：協助密碼貨幣交易所營運商 OKX 和紐約證券交易所所有者建立合併數位和傳統金融的新業務。

articles.title: World Cup Mints Big Prediction Winners and Million-Dollar Losers
articles.summary: Yesha Yadav, professor of law and associate dean at Vanderbilt Law School, joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." The World Cup is turning prediction markets into a public ledger of million-dollar bets, exposing big wins and dramatic losses as the tournament attracts more money to the fast-growing industry. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 世界盃產生百萬美元預測贏家和輸家
articles.summary_zh: 范德堡法學院法律教授兼副院長 Yesha Yadav 在 Bloomberg Crypto 節目中指出，世界盃正將預測市場轉變為百萬美元投注的公開帳本，隨著錦標賽吸引更多資金而暴露大贏和慘敗。

articles.title: White House drastically shortens deadline for dropping quantum-vulnerable crypto
articles.summary: The White House is drastically shortening the deadline for government agencies and organizations to adopt new quantum-resistant encryption systems that will withstand attacks that use quantum computers, as the federal government seeks to protect decades’ worth of secrets belonging to militaries, banks, governments, and most individuals on Earth. The executive order, titled Securing the Nation against Advanced Cryptographic Attacks , requires computing systems for “high-value assets” and “high-impact systems” to transition to post-quantum cryptographic key establishment schemes by December 31, 2030, and to quantum-safe digital signature schemes by December 31, 2031. Heading off a significant threat The new deadline, which for many organizations is about five years sooner than the previous o
articles.title_zh: 白宮大幅縮短淘汰量子易受攻擊密碼的期限
articles.summary_zh: 白宮大幅縮短了政府機構和組織採用能夠抵禦量子電腦攻擊的量子抗性加密系統的期限，以保護數十年來屬於軍隊和銀行的機密資訊。

articles.title: US's climate.gov site, taken down by Trump, relaunched by nonprofit
articles.summary: Over decades, researchers in the US government and programs it sponsored built up a tremendous number of climate resources, from comprehensive analyses to massive datasets to basic explainers meant to inform the public. And people within the government built the climate.gov website to make it all accessible. But if you try to navigate there today, you get redirected to the climate page of the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration, and are greeted with the following message: In compliance with Executive Order 14303 (“Restoring Gold Standard Science”), the White House Office of Science and Technology Policy’s June 23, 2025 Memorandum (“Agency Guidance for Implementing Gold Standard Science in the Conduct & Management of Scientific Activities”), 15 USC § 2904 (“National Climate
articles.title_zh: 被川普關閉的美國 climate.gov 網站由非營利組織重新啟動
articles.summary_zh: 多年來，美國政府研究人員和其資助的項目建立了大量氣候資源，包括綜合分析、海量數據集和基本說明，政府內部人士建立了 climate.gov 網站來提供這些資源給公眾。

articles.title: Odd police video shows drone removing knife from motionless suspect
articles.summary: In a supposed “nationwide first” use of drones to disarm a person, the Sacramento County Sheriff’s Office in California promoted a video showing how a small quadcopter drone used a dangling magnet to remove a knife from the hand of a motionless suspect. The promotional video shared to Facebook and Instagram on June 22, 2026, uses the Mission: Impossible film franchise theme to dramatize video footage of the incident that took place earlier in the month, which involved what the video describes as a “felony suspect armed with a knife and a firearm” who “was not responding to negotiators.” The sheriff’s office is just one among hundreds of US police departments and sheriff’s offices that have deployed camera-equipped drones to assist first responders. articles.title_zh: 奇異警察影片展示無人機從靜止嫌疑人手中移除刀具
articles.summary_zh: 薩克拉門托郡警長辦公室在加州宣傳了一段影片，展示一架小型四軸無人機如何使用懸掛的磁鐵從靜止嫌疑人手中移除刀具，聲稱這是全國首次使用無人機解除武裝。

articles.title: Oracle’s 21,000 layoffs help drive its debt-fueled AI investments
articles.summary: The growing use of AI contributed to Oracle laying off 21,000 workers in a year, according to a Securities and Exchange Commission filing on Monday. In its annual regulatory filing for the fiscal year ending May 31, Oracle said it has 141,000 full-time employees. In its 2025 filing, Oracle said it had 162,000 employees. The reported 12.9 percent reduction followed March reports of mass layoffs at the database management software company. "[T]he adoption and deployment of AI technologies across our operations have resulted, and may continue to result, in reductions to our workforce," the filing reads. Read full article Comments
articles.title_zh: Oracle 的 21,000 人裁員幫助推動其債務融資的 AI 投資
articles.summary_zh: 根據周一的美國證券交易委員會文件，AI 的日益增長使用導致 Oracle 在一年內裁員 21,000 人；該公司在截至 5 月 31 日的財政年度申報中擁有 141,000 名全職員工。

articles.title: A curious crossover: The Toyota C-HR review
articles.summary: After a slower start than its major rivals, Toyota has been making up for it with a flurry of new electric vehicles for the North American market. Its first attempt, the bZ4x, was an also-ran, but a new battery pack, more efficient motors, and a NACS charging port transformed the face-lifted bZ into an EV I happily recommend . Then, earlier this year, it followed up with some bZ-related variants. For those who miss the vibe of a station wagon, there is the bZ Woodland , and an all-electric Highlander is nearing the showroom, too. But today's focus is the C-HR, and I'm still not entirely sure what to make of it. It's the smallest of the bunch, some 6.7 inches (170 mm) shorter than the bZ. articles.title_zh: 奇特跨界：Toyota C-HR 評測

articles.title: ABC asks viewers to protest FCC attempt to "control who is allowed" on The View
articles.summary: ABC is urging viewers to write to the Federal Communications Commission and tell it to stop trying to "control who is allowed to appear" on The View . An ABC commercial that started airing yesterday asked viewers to submit responses to the FCC's call for public comment on whether the talk show is a “bona fide news interview program.” " The View has welcomed your favorite guests and covered the issues you care about for nearly 30 years," ABC's ad said. "Now, the FCC wants to control who is allowed on the show. Viewers, use your voice. Tell the FCC to let the viewers decide." For decades, the FCC has classified late-night and daytime entertainment talk shows as bona fide news for the purposes of their interview segments. articles.title: Early land animals skipped the tadpole phase
articles.summary: For decades, biologists thought that early tetrapods, ancient vertebrates that started conquering the land over 300 million years ago, developed like modern amphibians—beginning their lives as purely aquatic tadpoles and then metamorphosing into terrestrial adults. “A lot of that comes from this old ‘scala naturae’ idea that you had fish that evolved into the next stage up, which were amphibians, and then amphibians evolved into the next stage up, which were reptiles that evolved into birds and mammals,” said Jason Pardo, a research associate at the Field Museum. articles.title_zh: 早期陸地動物跳過了蝌蚪階段
articles.summary_zh: 數十年來，生物學家認為早期四足動物（3 億多年前開始征服陸地的古代脊椎動物）像現代兩棲動物一樣發育，生命最初以純水生蝌蚪開始，隨後變態為陸地成體。

articles.title: Trump may be mystery patient in odd case of 79yo getting experimental obesity drug
articles.summary: In an extremely odd case, a single 79-year-old patient was granted early access to Eli Lilly's powerful, still-experimental obesity drug retatrutide through the Food and Drug Administration's "compassionate use" program—raising immediate questions if that sole patient is President Donald Trump, according to a report by Stat News . Lilly's retatrutide is a highly anticipated next-generation obesity drug that targets GIP and glucagon hormones in addition to GLP-1. It is currently in late-stage trials to treat obesity, diabetes, sleep apnea, and other conditions. Data from a Phase 3 trial that Lilly released in May indicates that patients with obesity (but without diabetes) who took the drug for 80 weeks lost 28 percent of their weight, an amount comparable to bariatric surgery. articles.summary_zh: 在極其奇異的個案中，一位 79 歲患者獲准通過美國食品藥物管理局「人道使用」計劃提前獲得禮來公司強大的實驗性肥胖症藥物 retatrutide，引發該唯一患者是否為川普總統的立即疑問。

articles.title: SSH函式庫libssh2揭露重大漏洞，可能導致攻擊者透過特製SSH封包執行任意程式碼
articles.summary: 廣泛應用於SSH通訊的開源函式庫專案libssh2，近日揭露重大漏洞CVE-2026-55200，可能導致未經身分驗證的攻擊者透過特製SSH封包觸發漏洞，進而從遠端執行程式碼，CVSS v4嚴重性等級達9.2分，影響1.11.1版以前的libssh2，由於libssh2廣泛應用於檔案傳輸工具、備份軟體及其他SSH相關應用，因此相關產品可能受到波及。libssh2專案開發團隊已將修補程式提交至GitHub程式碼庫，並正在準備發布正式修補版本。

articles.title: 1Password併購身分安全新創Apono，強化AI代理與非人類身分即時存取治理
articles.summary:
非人類身分（NHI）與AI代理持續成為資安市場關注的焦點，知名身分識別與安全廠商1Password於6月15日宣布併購以色列資安新創公司Apono。1Password強調，Apono是即時（Just-In-Time）存取治理領域的創新者，此次併購將加速實現將各類身分管理整合至單一平臺的願景。
該公司指出，隨著AI代理的演進，突顯人類身分管理與機器身分管理往往屬於不同系統。如今AI代理開始介入企業關鍵系統，這種碎片化架構已成為安全治理的阻礙。更嚴峻的是，現有的身分識別系統多半僅聚焦於「准許進入」的驗證關卡，一旦身分通過驗證進入系統，後續行為監控就不在其管轄範圍。

articles.title: 巴西民防警報系統疑遭入侵，里約熱內盧等地民眾收到假警報
articles.summary:
巴西民防警報系統Defesa Civil Alerta在6月19日晚間至20日凌晨遭未經授權使用，有人透過公共警報發送介面（Interface de Divulgação de Alertas Públicos，IDAP）向多個地區民眾的手機發送假冒的緊急警報，影響範圍包括聖保羅州、南馬托格羅索州、里約熱內盧州、巴拉那州與聯邦區。
Defesa Civil Alerta採用細胞廣播（Cell Broadcast）技術，透過行動基地臺向指定區域內連上4G或5G行動網路的手機推送警報，這類機制常用於災害與公共安全告警，優點是可在短時間內觸及大量特定區域民眾。

articles.title: QNAP修補旗下NAS與網路視訊監控產品漏洞，包含兩項可能導致服務中斷的重大漏洞
articles.summary: 儲存設備廠商威聯通（QNAP）於6月17日發布資安公告，修補旗下NAS與視訊監控平臺共14項漏洞，影響QTS、QuTS hero、QuTS cloud等NAS作業系統，以及QVP視訊監控平臺。建議用戶升級至QTS 5.2.9、QuTS hero h5.2.9、QuTS cloud c5.2.9與QVP 2.8.0以上版本，以降低遭攻擊風險。

articles.title: LG與三星智慧電視逾三成App讓用戶電視慘變代理伺服器節點
articles.summary:
研究人員發現，三星、LG智慧電視的App，有將1/3會利用或出售用戶住家IP位址，讓用戶電視淪為導引流量的代理伺服器的安全隱憂。
資安業者Spur分析6,038個三星和LG智慧電視的App套件分析，發現有2,058款內含將用戶住家IP位址提供作為代理伺服器（proxy）的SDK。

articles.summary: 6月18日Salesforce發布資安公告，表示他們近期偵測到Klue Battlecards應用程式出現異常活動，部分用戶資料疑似遭未經授權存取，因此暫停該應用程式與Salesforce之間的連結。後續AI競爭情報公司Klue也證實發生事故，攻擊者透過與整合服務相關的外流憑證得到存取權限，進而竊取多個用戶的Salesforce等第三方平臺資料。相關消息一出，很快有資安公司證實受害。
